product_summary: This hybrid agent oversees the full lifecycle of organizational resources, competence development, and internal communications in line with ISO 9001:2015 Clause 7. It continuously analyzes workforce skills, allocates people and infrastructure, schedules training, controls document versions, plans communications, and monitors KPIs while enforcing GDPR employee data rules and retention policies. By unifying these activities into a single automated workflow, the agent reduces administrative overhead, prevents compliance gaps, and ensures teams have the right capabilities and information at the right time. Executives gain real-time visibility into resource health and audit readiness without manual tracking.
value_proposition: Automates competence gap analysis, resource allocation, training, and document control to deliver continuous ISO 9001 compliance and optimized workforce performance.
technical_summary: The hybrid agent combines rule-based orchestration with machine learning models for gap detection and KPI forecasting, exposing REST and event-driven APIs that integrate with HRIS, LMS, DMS, and communication platforms. It maintains an auditable knowledge graph of resources and documents, applies role-based access controls for GDPR compliance, and supports both batch and real-time synchronization with existing enterprise systems. Versioning, retention schedules, and change logs are handled through a dedicated compliance layer that can be extended via plug-in connectors.
integration_guide:
# Integration Guide â€” iso9001_support_agent
**Process:** Support — Resources, Competence and Communication
**Version:** 1.0.0

## Prerequisites
- Python 3.10+
- Agentic Zero runtime installed
- API credentials configured in .env

## Installation
```bash
# Copy agent to your project
cp iso9001_support_agent.py ./agents/
```

## Basic Usage
```python
from agents.iso9001_support_agent import Iso9001SupportAgentAgent

agent = Iso9001SupportAgentAgent()
result = agent.execute({
    "resource_requirements": your_resource_requirements_data,
    "competence_needs": your_competence_needs_data,
    "infrastructure_inventory": your_infrastructure_inventory_data,
})
print(result['outputs'])
```

## Supported Systems
- SAP ECC
- SAP S/4HANA
- SAP EWM
- Oracle ERP Cloud
- Oracle JDE

## Tools Required
- ERP_API
- LMS_export
- HRIS_connector
- DMS_access
- email_log_parser

## Escalation
The agent automatically escalates to human when:
- competence_coverage_rate < 0.95
- ControlledDocument version mismatch
- infrastructure_availability < 0.95
- training overdue >90 days
api_endpoints: POST /api/v1/agents/iso9001_support_agent/execute â€” Execute the agent with inputs
GET  /api/v1/agents/iso9001_support_agent/status â€” Get agent status and metrics
demo_script:
1. Open with the compliance gap: "ISO 9001 clause 7 requires documented competence and communication evidence—manual tracking costs €2,240+ per quarter in audits and rework; our €224 agent delivers 10x ROI by automating it."
2. Trigger resource allocation: Ask the agent to map current team competencies against an open support ticket backlog and auto-assign training resources with audit-ready logs.
3. Demonstrate real-time competence update: Show the agent ingesting a completed training record, updating the competence matrix, and flagging gaps for the next quarter in under 30 seconds.
4. Automate stakeholder communication: Instruct the agent to generate and send ISO-compliant status updates to relevant roles, logging delivery and acknowledgments for traceability.
5. Run ROI snapshot: Display the live dashboard calculating time saved (est. 22 hours/quarter) and risk reduction, confirming the 10x multiplier versus the €224 subscription.
6. Close with compliance proof: Export the full audit trail package and note one-click readiness for external ISO auditors, locking in the value proposition.
use_cases: Use case 1: Manufacturing firm uses the agent to map Clause 7 competence gaps across 3 plants, cutting external auditor prep time by 120 hours and avoiding €85k in potential certification delays

Use case 2: Pharma company deploys the agent to audit GDPR employee data flows in support processes, identifying and remediating 47 high-risk records before inspection and eliminating €250k fine exposure

Use case 3: Automotive supplier automates Clause 7 document retention schedules for 12,000 records, reducing off-site storage costs by 28% (€62k/year) while passing ISO surveillance audit with zero findings

Use case 4: Defense contractor uses the agent to standardize cross-functional communication protocols under Clause 7, shortening resource reallocation cycles from 14 days to 5 days and delivering €410k in program efficiency gains

Use case 5: Food distributor implements the agent for Clause 7 competence tracking across 8 sites, lowering training non-compliance incidents by 92% and avoiding €120k in regulatory penalties during unannounced audits
